scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.start:android: concurrently -n backend,android -c blue,magenta "npm run backend" "npm run android"
scripts.start:ios: concurrently -n backend,ios -c blue,magenta "npm run backend" "npm run ios"
scripts.start:web: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "npm run backend" "npm run web"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend ci && npm run build:web && npm run build:backend
